_comment: Sample input + expected output for amplify_preflight. Call this BEFORE Claude touches the system. The risk level and matched patterns let Claude (or you) decide whether to proceed, abort, or read more docs first.

args.task: Configure agent heartbeat to use a new model
args.context: The current heartbeat model is rate-limited; need to pick a replacement that won't crash the daemon.

matched_patterns.title: Avoid model names containing another provider's prefix

expected_response_shape.suggested_approach: Read your agent's heartbeat configuration for the current model fallback chain. Verify any candidate against the TPM and context-window requirements documented in your architecture notes. Avoid model names that contain another provider's prefix.
